chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-562 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For orders on MA 4623/2023 3.For hearing of main case. 22-01-2024 Mr. Muhammad Ali Ansari, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Imran Mobeen Khan, Assistant P.G for the State. ***** Learned counsel for the applicant, under instructions, does not press this Crl. Misc. Application and seeks permission to avail the remedy before the competent forum by filing Crl. Direct Compliant for redressal of his grievance, which has not been objected by learned Assistant P.G. Accordingly, this Crl. Misc. Application along with listed application is dismissed as not pressed. However, the applicant may approach the proper forum, as requested by him, if he is so advised. The Crl. Misc. Application is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Ahmad
